info.description: Fitness tracking API for personal trainers and athletes
info.title: GymTrack API

get.description: Retrieve paginated meal history for a specific client (trainers only, requires active relationship)

parameters.description: Filter by meal type (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack)
parameters.name: mealType

200.description: Client meals retrieved successfully" "Returns meals array and count

403.description: Only trainers can view client meals or no active relationship

post.description: Athlete creates a new coaching request to request coaching from a trainer

403.description: Forbidden - only athletes can create coaching requests

get.description: Retrieve coaching requests for the current user (sent by athlete or received by trainer)
Trainer retrieves all pending coaching requests they have received

403.description: Forbidden - only trainers can view pending requests

post.description: Trainer accepts a coaching request from an athlete

200.description: Coaching request accepted successfully" "{\"message\":\"coaching request accepted\",\"relationship\":{}}

400.description: Invalid request or coaching request not found

403.description: Forbidden - only trainers can accept coaching requests

post.description: Trainer rejects a coaching request from an athlete

200.description: Coaching request rejected successfully" "{\"message\":\"coaching request rejected\"}

400.description: Invalid request or coaching request not found

403.description: Forbidden - only trainers can reject coaching requests

get.description: Retrieve all comments for a specific workout or meal. The user must have access to the target.

parameters.description: ID of the target (workout or meal)
parameters.name: targetId

403.description: Access denied

post.description: Create a new comment on a workout or meal. The user must have permission to comment on the target.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

403.description: Access denied or cannot comment on this target

put.description: Update the content of an existing comment. Only the author can edit their comment.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

403.description: Only the comment author can edit it

delete.description: Delete an existing comment. Only the author can delete their comment.

403.description: Only the comment author can delete it

get.description: Retrieve paginated meal history for the authenticated athlete with optional date range filtering

200.description: Meals retrieved successfully" "Returns meals array and count

403.description: Only athletes can list their meals

post.description: Create a new meal entry for the authenticated athlete

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

403.description: Only athletes can create meals

get.description: Retrieve a meal by its ID (athletes can only access their own meals)

403.description: Access denied

put.description: Update an existing meal (only within 24 hours of creation, athletes can only update their own meals)

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

403.description: Access denied or cannot edit after 24 hours

delete.description: Delete an existing meal (only within 24 hours of creation, athletes can only delete their own meals)

403.description: Access denied or cannot delete after 24 hours

post.description: Athletes accept an invitation by providing the 8-character code generated by a trainer.

200.description: Invitation accepted successfully" {"message":"Invitation accepted successfully","relationship": models.Relationship}

400.description: Bad request" {"error":"Invalid request body"} or {"error":"Validation failed"} or {"error":"Invalid invitation code"}

403.description: Forbidden" {"error":"Only athletes can accept invitations"}

get.description: Trainers can view comprehensive details for a specific client including workout/meal counts and current week activity.

403.description: Forbidden" {"error":"Only trainers can view client details"} or {"error":"You don't have an active relationship with this client"}

500.description: Internal server error" {"error":"Failed to verify relationship/get athlete details"}

get.description: Trainers can view detailed analytics including workout volume trends, exercise breakdown, consistency scores, and nutrition averages for a specific client.

403.description: Forbidden" {"error":"Only trainers can view client stats"} or {"error":"You don't have an active relationship with this client"}

500.description: Internal server error" {"error":"Failed to verify relationship"}

post.description: Trainers generate an 8-character invitation code to share with athletes. The code expires after a set period.

403.description: Forbidden" {"error":"Only trainers can generate invitations"}

500.description: Internal server error" {"error":"Failed to generate invitation","details":"error message"}

get.description: Trainers can view all their active client relationships with athlete profiles.

403.description: Forbidden" {"error":"Only trainers can view their clients"}

500.description: Internal server error" {"error":"Failed to retrieve clients"}

get.description: Athletes can view their currently assigned trainer and any pending invitation codes.

403.description: Forbidden" {"error":"Only athletes can view their trainer"}

500.description: Internal server error" {"error":"Failed to retrieve invitations/relationships"}

delete.description: Either the trainer or athlete can terminate the relationship. This action deactivates the relationship and removes the trainer assignment from the athlete's profile.

200.description: Relationship terminated successfully" {"message":"Relationship terminated successfully","relationship": models.Relationship}

403.description: Forbidden" {"error":"You are not authorized to terminate this relationship"}

500.description: Internal server error" {"error":"Failed to terminate relationship/get athlete/update profile"}

put.description: Updates an existing review. Only the author can update their review.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

403.description: Only the author can update the review

delete.description: Deletes an existing review. Only the author can delete their review.

403.description: Only the author can delete the review

get.description: Retrieves a list of trainers with optional filtering by specialization, location, minimum rating, and availability status. Supports pagination.
get.summary: Get all trainers with optional filtering

parameters.description: Filter by availability for new clients (true/false)
parameters.name: availableForNewClients

delete.description: Delete a specific availability slot by slot ID. Only the trainer who owns the slot can delete it.

403.description: Forbidden - not your slot

get.description: Retrieve all availability slots for the currently authenticated trainer

put.description: Update or create availability slots for the currently authenticated trainer (replaces all existing slots)

parameters.description: Array of availability slots to set
parameters.name: slots

get.description: Retrieves the profile information for the currently authenticated trainer

403.description: Forbidden - only trainers can access" "{\"error\":\"Only trainers can access profile\"}

404.description: Profile not found" "{\"error\":\"trainer profile not found\"}

put.description: Updates the profile information for the currently authenticated trainer

get.description: Retrieves detailed profile information for a specific trainer by their ID
Retrieve availability slots for a specific trainer by ID (public access)
Retrieve all reviews for a specific trainer. This endpoint is publicly accessible.

post.description: Allows an athlete to create a review for a specific trainer. Requires athlete role.
post.summary: Create a review for a trainer

400.description: Invalid request body or validation failed

403.description: Only athletes can create reviews

get.description: Returns the profile information of the user associated with the provided JWT token.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

put.description: Updates the profile information for the authenticated user. Returns the updated user data.

parameters.description: Update profile request containing the updated profile data
parameters.name: request

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

gymtrack-backend_internal_domain_models..description: TrainerAvailability model representing a single availability slot

availabilityId.description: @Description Unique identifier for the availability slot

createdAt.description: @Description Timestamp when the slot was created

isBooked.description: @Description Whether this slot has been booked by a client

updatedAt.description: @Description Timestamp when the slot was last updated

internal_api_handlers.CreateCommentReque.description: Request body for creating a new comment on a workout or meal.

internal_api_handlers.CreateMealRequest.description: Request body for creating a new meal entry

internal_api_handlers.CreateReviewReques.description: Request body for creating a review for a trainer.

internal_api_handlers.CreateWorkoutReque.description: Request to create a new workout

internal_api_handlers.UpdateCommentReque.description: Request body for updating an existing comment's content.

internal_api_handlers.UpdateMealRequest.description: Request body for updating an existing meal entry

internal_api_handlers.UpdateProfileReque.description: UpdateProfileRequest is used to modify user profile information.

profile.description:
Profile contains the updated profile information.
@Description The user's profile data including personal details and role-specific fields.

internal_api_handlers.UpdateReviewReques.description: Request body for updating an existing review.

internal_api_handlers.UpdateWorkoutReque.description: Request to update an existing workout

internal_api_handlers.UserResponse.description: UserResponse contains all user information except the password hash.

profile.description:
Profile contains user-specific profile information.
@Description The user's profile data including personal details and role-specific fields.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
